description: Queen Patch 9 (1 April 2020) — Fishing Improvements, New Wardrobe Skin (The Eggsecutioner), Easter Event, Fixes.

sections.heading: Fishing Improvements
items: Fishing now has a chance to give seaweed as a bonus in areas that have not yet been exhausted — chance increases with the tier of the fishing spot
Food that gives a bonus to gathering yield now also applies that same bonus to fishing yield
Fisherman Armor and Avalonian Fishing Rods now apply their fishing yield bonuses to T1 fish and seaweed (previously only applied to T2 fish up to a maximum defined by the item)
Destiny Board fishing speed and fishing yield bonuses now apply to all tiers (previously only tiers 3–8)
sections.searchable_text: Fishing Improvements seaweed bonus tier gathering yield Fisherman Armor Avalonian Fishing Rods T1 T2 Destiny Board fishing speed yield bonuses all tiers

sections.heading: New Wardrobe Skin: The Eggsecutioner
sections.description: New wardrobe skin permanently available via the ingame Appearance menu. Also unlockable with Surprise Eggs available throughout the world during the Easter Event (April 8–22). Once acquired, unlocked for all characters on an account.
items: The Eggsecutioner is now permanently available via the ingame Appearance menu
Can also be unlocked with Surprise Eggs available during the Easter Event (April 8–22)
Once acquired, unlocked for all characters on an account; can be displayed in city, island, and Hideout zones
sections.searchable_text: New Wardrobe Skin Eggsecutioner Appearance menu Surprise Eggs Easter Event April account Hideout zones

sections.heading: Fixes
items: Tier-dependent fishing yield bonuses now apply based on the tier of the item caught rather than the tier of the cluster, as intended
Resolved a case where the Destiny Board bonus would not always apply to fishing
Fixed an issue where party markers would not update on same target and same party marker could be applied to two targets
Fixed an issue where closing a menu while scrolling or switching tabs would cause the menu to glitch when reopened
Additional minor graphical, UI, audio, and localization fixes
sections.searchable_text: Fixes fishing yield bonuses tier item caught cluster Destiny Board bonus party markers targets menu scrolling tabs glitch graphical UI audio localization
